meaning: n.安替比林(退热及止痛剂的一种)
examples: This paper expounds the influence of the purity of 4-antipyrine on the measurement of volatile phenol contents in water.
In this paper, amidopyrine (p) and antipyrine (a) in the compound amidopyrine injection were determined by coefficient multiplication method.
The chloroform solution of 4-Amino-antipyrine was used to measure the phenol in water by extraction and photometer. The method and the precision were discussed in this paper.
